Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: Mother Nature and Nubs Groomers teamed up today for the perfect Red and Blue loop experience . Blue bird sky , perfect corduroy, and SO MUCH SNOW!

nubsNob.xcTrails: All trails groomed and tracked today.
nubsNob.comments: It's another great day to ski and ride at Nub's Nob. The snow is machine groomed and in mid-winter condition. The sun is forecast to make an appearance this morning and the wind is light. Lifts will turn from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
